sql: WITH t AS ( SELECT ct.net_sol, ct.entry_ts, ct.exit_reason, ct.lead_wallet, ct.hold_sec, CASE WHEN ct.entry_price_sol>0 AND ct.high_price_sol IS NOT NULL THEN 100.0*(ct.high_price_sol/ct.entry_price_sol-1.0) END mfe FROM copy_trades ct JOIN graduations g ON g.id = (SELECT MAX(g2.id) FROM graduations g2 WHERE g2.mint = ct.mint) WHERE ct.status='closed' AND ct.net_sol IS NOT NULL AND ct.strategy_id='copy-hotlead-strict' AND ct.entry_drift_pct <= 0 AND ct.entry_ts - COALESCE(g.migration_timestamp, g.timestamp) < 900 ), b AS (SELECT (MIN(entry_ts)+MAX(entry_ts))/2 mid FROM t), f AS (SELECT t.*, CASE WHEN entry_ts < (SELECT mid FROM b) THEN 1 ELSE 2 END half FROM t) SELECT 'exit_'||exit_reason k, half, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(net_sol),2) net, ROUND(AVG(net_sol),4) avg_net, ROUND(AVG(mfe),1) avg_mfe, SUM(mfe>=50) mfe50, SUM(mfe>=100) mfe100, ROUND(AVG(hold_sec),0) avg_hold FROM f GROUP BY exit_reason, half UNION ALL SELECT 'leads', half, COUNT(DISTINCT lead_wallet), NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL FROM f GROUP BY half ORDER BY k, half
